meta.title: Lockheed Martin's MAKO hypersonic missile fits INSIDE the F-35 #fighterjet #hypersonicweapons
meta.description:
Lockheed Martin's MAKO hypersonic missile is small enough to be carried internally by stealth aircraft like the F-35. 

Learn more about Defense technology everyday by subscribing to Sandboxx!
